content: The recursive, repeated search-based knowledge building pattern that emerged in the fragmented definition of Topic B (centered on generic agents) can be reframed as the intrinsic curiosity signal for an episodic planning neural architecture agent from Topic A. Episodic memory in the planning agent stores these fragmented, incomplete search traces as 'curiosity triggers' that drive the agent to actively fill in knowledge gaps across repeated interaction cycles.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
